prediction.reasoning: Based on MMM's historical volatility of approximately 20-25% annually, I estimated a 20-day standard deviation of around 3.5%. The point estimate reflects modest upward momentum typical for large-cap dividend stocks. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming normal distribution of returns, with the 50% CI covering ±2.8%, 80% CI covering ±5.6%, and 90% CI covering ±7.2% from the point estimate.
